DP.103.0000:
[FF01,00C8]Ohohoho!![FF01,0064]\f
Finally, you have arrived!\f
Since I came to this country, always
I try to learn new things.\f
They hold Contests in this city?
I say to myself, enfin, I will excel.\f
That is why I dress this way.
C’est une performance!\f
Also, I study Pokémon very much.
I have come to be Gym Leader.\f
And, uh, so it shall be that you
challenge me.\f
But I shall win.
That is what a Gym Leader does, non?\f
DP.103.0001:
I am dumbfounded!\f
So very, very strong!
You, your Pokémon, so strong!\f
Your power is admirable!
I shall honor it with this Gym Badge!\f
DP.103.0002:
[0103,0000] received
the Relic Badge from Fantina!
DP.103.0003:
That Badge will let you use the
hidden move Surf outside of battle.\f
Also, you can make use of this
Technical Machine.\f
That is what I think.\f
DP.103.0004:
That [0108,0000]...
It contains [0106,0001].\f
A very startling move it is.
Its hits turn critical often!
DP.103.0005:
Five Gym Badges...\f
But you must not forget this.
There are many other Trainers.\f
Strong Trainers, too.
There are many more in Sinnoh.\f
Have patience! You must become
stronger, one at a time.
